title: Code for scRNA-seq analysis of GEM model in IDH-mutant glioma
author: Wen, Zebin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the R scripts and workflow for the Metaprogram generation of single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) data, as described in the associated manuscript.
steps_raw: This repository contains the R scripts and workflow for the Metaprogram generation of single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) data, as described in the associated manuscript.
